default.intro_message_1: 左键点击[方框]内文字确认选择
default.intro_message_2: 鼠标悬停<link="tooltip_highlight"><mark=#ffff0044>高亮</mark></link>文字以获取额外信息
default.campaign_chalicedivers_tooltip:
A limited-scope campaign aimed at learning or experimenting with combat systems. Death no longer result in a game over.
Start the campaign with up to 2 additional companions chosen from a preset selection (Starting Option Companion is disabled in this campaign)
Limit: Player Character Origin must be Forest Dweller
Starting Gift Companion is disabled.

This is a parody of Bloodborne, with some more references from various ero-games.
default.campaign2_start_none_tooltip:
Begin with no extra companion, instead start with more resources.
All companions are recruitable in-game regardless of starting options.
default.campaign2_start_tadadada_dungeonwithgal_:
Begin with Monica & Yamemoto.
(from ダンジョンウィズガール by ただただ愚か)
default.campaign2_start_avantgarde_amelie_toolti:
Begin with Amelie
(from アメリ・ブランシェットは何度も堕ちる ～カレドニー魔法学院と繰り返す一週間～ by AVANTGARDE)
